About Us

Gujarat's Most Trusted Tile Store

Raj Tiles & Design Door is Ankleshwar's premier destination for premium tiles, sanitaryware, CP fittings and door hardware. With over 15 years of experience, we've helped thousands of homes become beautiful.

From elegant designer basins to high-tech shower systems — every product in our showroom is curated with care, and our team is here to guide you every step of the way.

🏆
Premium Brands
Authorized dealer of India's top brands.
🎨
500+ Designs
Massive tile & sanitaryware collection.
🤝

Our team helps pick the perfect products.
⚡
Fast Delivery
Quick delivery across Bharuch district.
